targets.rawSql: SELECT count(*)::bigint AS active_targets FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_targets t WHERE t.is_active = true AND ('$environment' = '.*' OR t.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '.*' OR t.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '.*' OR t.target_name = '$target');

SELECT count(DISTINCT r.target_name)::bigint AS recent_targets FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_probe_results r WHERE r.checked_at >= now() - interval '3 minutes' AND ('$environment' = '.*' OR r.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '.*' OR r.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '.*' OR r.target_name = '$target');

WITH active AS (
  SELECT count(*)::bigint AS c
  FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_targets t
  WHERE t.is_active = true AND ('$environment' = '.*' OR t.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '.*' OR t.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '.*' OR t.target_name = '$target')
), recent AS (
  SELECT count(DISTINCT r.target_name)::bigint AS c
  FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_probe_results r
  WHERE r.checked_at >= now() - interval '3 minutes' AND ('$environment' = '.*' OR r.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '.*' OR r.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '.*' OR r.target_name = '$target')
)
SELECT greatest(active.c - recent.c, 0)::bigint AS missing_targets
FROM active CROSS JOIN recent;

SELECT coalesce(extract(epoch FROM now() - max(r.checked_at))::bigint, 999999999) AS ingest_lag_seconds FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_probe_results r WHERE ('$environment' = '.*' OR r.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '.*' OR r.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '.*' OR r.target_name = '$target');

WITH active AS (
  SELECT count(*)::numeric AS c
  FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_targets t
  WHERE t.is_active = true AND ('$environment' = '.*' OR t.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '.*' OR t.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '.*' OR t.target_name = '$target')
), recent AS (
  SELECT count(DISTINCT r.target_name)::numeric AS c
  FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_probe_results r
  WHERE r.checked_at >= now() - interval '3 minutes' AND ('$environment' = '.*' OR r.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '.*' OR r.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '.*' OR r.target_name = '$target')
)
SELECT coalesce(round(recent.c / nullif(active.c, 0) * 100, 2), 0) AS coverage_pct
FROM active CROSS JOIN recent;

panels.title: SQL Samples Per Minute vs Expected

targets.rawSql:
WITH bounds AS (
  SELECT date_trunc('minute', $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AS start_at,
         date_trunc('minute', $__timeTo()::timestamptz) AS end_at
), minutes AS (
  SELECT generate_series(start_at, end_at, interval '1 minute') AS bucket
  FROM bounds
), actual AS (
  SELECT date_trunc('minute', r.checked_at) AS bucket, count(*)::double precision AS actual_rows
  FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_probe_results r
  WHERE $__timeFilter(r.checked_at) AND ('$environment' = '.*' OR r.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '.*' OR r.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '.*' OR r.target_name = '$target')
  GROUP BY 1
), expected AS (
  SELECT count(*)::double precision AS expected_rows
  FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_targets t
  WHERE t.is_active = true AND ('$environment' = '.*' OR t.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '.*' OR t.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '.*' OR t.target_name = '$target')
)
SELECT m.bucket AS "time", 'actual rows/min' AS metric, coalesce(a.actual_rows, 0) AS value
FROM minutes m
LEFT JOIN actual a ON a.bucket = m.bucket
UNION ALL
SELECT m.bucket AS "time", 'expected rows/min' AS metric, e.expected_rows AS value
FROM minutes m
CROSS JOIN expected e
ORDER BY 1, 2;

WITH bounds AS (
  SELECT date_trunc('minute', $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AS start_at,
         date_trunc('minute', $__timeTo()::timestamptz) AS end_at
), minutes AS (
  SELECT generate_series(start_at, end_at, interval '1 minute') AS bucket
  FROM bounds
), actual AS (
  SELECT date_trunc('minute', r.checked_at) AS bucket, count(DISTINCT r.target_name)::double precision AS target_count
  FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_probe_results r
  WHERE $__timeFilter(r.checked_at) AND ('$environment' = '.*' OR r.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '.*' OR r.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '.*' OR r.target_name = '$target')
  GROUP BY 1
), expected AS (
  SELECT count(*)::double precision AS expected_targets
  FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_targets t
  WHERE t.is_active = true AND ('$environment' = '.*' OR t.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '.*' OR t.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '.*' OR t.target_name = '$target')
)
SELECT m.bucket AS "time", 'actual targets/min' AS metric, coalesce(a.target_count, 0) AS value
FROM minutes m
LEFT JOIN actual a ON a.bucket = m.bucket
UNION ALL
SELECT m.bucket AS "time", 'expected targets/min' AS metric, e.expected_targets AS value
FROM minutes m
CROSS JOIN expected e
ORDER BY 1, 2;

WITH latest AS (
  SELECT
    t.target_name,
    t.environment,
    t.db_type,
    t.instance,
    t.criticality,
    t.team,
    r.checked_at,
    r.is_up,
    r.latency_ms,
    r.created_at
  FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_targets t
  LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT checked_at, is_up, latency_ms, created_at
    FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_probe_results r
    WHERE r.target_name = t.target_name
    ORDER BY checked_at DESC
    LIMIT 1
  ) r ON true
  WHERE t.is_active = true AND ('$environment' = '.*' OR t.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '.*' OR t.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '.*' OR t.target_name = '$target')
)

SELECT
  target_name,
  environment,
  db_type,
  instance,
  checked_at AS last_probe_at,
  coalesce(extract(epoch FROM now() - checked_at)::bigint, 999999999) AS age_seconds
FROM latest
WHERE checked_at IS NULL OR checked_at < now() - interval '3 minutes'
ORDER BY age_seconds DESC, target_name;

panels.title: Inventory vs Latest Raw Label Mismatch

targets.rawSql:
WITH latest AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (target_name)
    target_name, db_type, environment, instance, criticality, team
  FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_probe_results
  ORDER BY target_name, checked_at DESC
)
SELECT
  t.target_name,
  t.environment AS inventory_environment,
  latest.environment AS latest_environment,
  t.db_type AS inventory_db_type,
  latest.db_type AS latest_db_type,
  t.instance AS inventory_instance,
  latest.instance AS latest_instance,
  t.criticality AS inventory_criticality,
  latest.criticality AS latest_criticality,
  t.team AS inventory_team,
  latest.team AS latest_team
FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_targets t
JOIN latest ON latest.target_name = t.target_name
WHERE t.is_active = true AND ('$environment' = '.*' OR t.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '.*' OR t.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '.*' OR t.target_name = '$target')
  AND (
    t.environment IS DISTINCT FROM latest.environment
    OR t.db_type IS DISTINCT FROM latest.db_type
    OR t.instance IS DISTINCT FROM latest.instance
    OR t.criticality IS DISTINCT FROM latest.criticality
    OR t.team IS DISTINCT FROM latest.team
  )
ORDER BY t.target_name;

panels.title: Minute-normalized Raw vs Daily KPI Drift Today

targets.rawSql:
WITH minute_samples AS (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('minute', r.checked_at) AS period_minute,
    r.target_name,
    min(r.is_up) AS is_up
  FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_probe_results r
  WHERE r.checked_at >= current_date AND ('$environment' = '.*' OR r.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '.*' OR r.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '.*' OR r.target_name = '$target')
  GROUP BY 1, 2
), raw_today AS (
  SELECT
    period_minute::date AS period_start,
    target_name,
    count(*)::bigint AS raw_probes,
    count(*) FILTER (WHERE is_up = 1)::bigint AS raw_up,
    count(*) FILTER (WHERE is_up = 0)::bigint AS raw_down
  FROM minute_samples
  GROUP BY 1, 2
), kpi_today AS (
  SELECT period_start, target_name, probes, up_probes, down_probes
  FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_daily_kpi
  WHERE period_start = current_date AND ('$environment' = '.*' OR environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '.*' OR db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '.*' OR target_name = '$target')
)
SELECT
  coalesce(k.target_name, r.target_name) AS target_name,
  coalesce(r.raw_probes, 0) AS normalized_raw_probes,
  coalesce(k.probes, 0) AS kpi_probes,
  coalesce(r.raw_up, 0) AS normalized_raw_up,
  coalesce(k.up_probes, 0) AS kpi_up,
  coalesce(r.raw_down, 0) AS normalized_raw_down,
  coalesce(k.down_probes, 0) AS kpi_down
FROM raw_today r
FULL JOIN kpi_today k ON k.period_start = r.period_start AND k.target_name = r.target_name
WHERE coalesce(r.raw_probes, 0) <> coalesce(k.probes, 0)
   OR coalesce(r.raw_up, 0) <> coalesce(k.up_probes, 0)
   OR coalesce(r.raw_down, 0) <> coalesce(k.down_probes, 0)
ORDER BY 1;

SELECT
  r.checked_at,
  r.target_name,
  r.environment,
  r.db_type,
  r.instance,
  round(r.latency_ms::numeric, 2) AS latency_ms,
  r.error_text
FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_probe_results r
WHERE $__timeFilter(r.checked_at) AND r.is_up = 0 AND ('$environment' = '.*' OR r.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '.*' OR r.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '.*' OR r.target_name = '$target')
ORDER BY r.checked_at DESC
LIMIT 200;

WITH raw_stats AS (
  SELECT count(*)::bigint AS raw_rows, min(checked_at) AS oldest_raw_at, max(checked_at) AS newest_raw_at, round(extract(epoch FROM now() - min(checked_at))::numeric / 86400.0, 2) AS oldest_raw_age_days
  FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_probe_results
  WHERE ('$environment' = '.*' OR environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '.*' OR db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '.*' OR target_name = '$target')
), hourly_stats AS (
  SELECT count(*)::bigint AS hourly_rows, min(period_hour) AS oldest_hour, max(period_hour) AS newest_hour
  FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_hourly_kpi
  WHERE ('$environment' = '.*' OR environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '.*' OR db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '.*' OR target_name = '$target')
), kpi_stats AS (
  SELECT count(*)::bigint AS kpi_rows, min(period_start) AS oldest_kpi_date, max(period_start) AS newest_kpi_date
  FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_daily_kpi
  WHERE ('$environment' = '.*' OR environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '.*' OR db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '.*' OR target_name = '$target')
), event_stats AS (
  SELECT
    (SELECT count(*)::bigint FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_status_events WHERE ('$environment' = '.*' OR environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '.*' OR db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '.*' OR target_name = '$target')) AS status_events,
    (SELECT count(*)::bigint FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_downtime_events WHERE ('$environment' = '.*' OR environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '.*' OR db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '.*' OR target_name = '$target')) AS downtime_events,
    (SELECT count(*)::bigint FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_latency_events WHERE ('$environment' = '.*' OR environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '.*' OR db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '.*' OR target_name = '$target')) AS latency_events,
    (SELECT count(*)::bigint FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_daily_error_summary WHERE ('$environment' = '.*' OR environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '.*' OR db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '.*' OR target_name = '$target')) AS daily_error_rows
), relation_stats AS (
  SELECT relname, pg_total_relation_size(c.oid) AS bytes
  FROM pg_class c JOIN pg_namespace n ON n.oid = c.relnamespace
  WHERE n.nspname = 'monitoring' AND relname IN (
    'db_port_blackbox_probe_results', 'db_port_blackbox_hourly_kpi', 'db_port_blackbox_daily_kpi', 'db_port_blackbox_status_events', 'db_port_blackbox_downtime_events', 'db_port_blackbox_latency_events', 'db_port_blackbox_daily_error_summary'
  )
)
SELECT 'raw_rows' AS metric, raw_rows::text AS value FROM raw_stats
UNION ALL SELECT 'oldest_raw_at', oldest_raw_at::text FROM raw_stats
UNION ALL SELECT 'newest_raw_at', newest_raw_at::text FROM raw_stats
UNION ALL SELECT 'oldest_raw_age_days', oldest_raw_age_days::text FROM raw_stats
UNION ALL SELECT 'hourly_rows', hourly_rows::text FROM hourly_stats
UNION ALL SELECT 'oldest_hour', oldest_hour::text FROM hourly_stats
UNION ALL SELECT 'newest_hour', newest_hour::text FROM hourly_stats
UNION ALL SELECT 'kpi_rows', kpi_rows::text FROM kpi_stats
UNION ALL SELECT 'oldest_kpi_date', oldest_kpi_date::text FROM kpi_stats
UNION ALL SELECT 'newest_kpi_date', newest_kpi_date::text FROM kpi_stats
UNION ALL SELECT 'status_events', status_events::text FROM event_stats
UNION ALL SELECT 'downtime_events', downtime_events::text FROM event_stats
UNION ALL SELECT 'latency_events', latency_events::text FROM event_stats
UNION ALL SELECT 'daily_error_rows', daily_error_rows::text FROM event_stats
UNION ALL SELECT relname || '_bytes', bytes::text FROM relation_stats
ORDER BY metric;

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT environment AS __text, environment AS __value FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_targets WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY 1;
list.label: Environment
list.name: environment
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT environment AS __text, environment AS __value FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_targets WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY 1;

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT db_type AS __text, db_type AS __value FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_targets WHERE is_active = true AND ('$environment' = '.*' OR environment = '$environment') ORDER BY 1;
list.label: DB Type
list.name: db_type
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT db_type AS __text, db_type AS __value FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_targets WHERE is_active = true AND ('$environment' = '.*' OR environment = '$environment') ORDER BY 1;

list.definition: SELECT target_name AS __text, target_name AS __value FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_targets WHERE is_active = true AND ('$environment' = '.*' OR environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '.*' OR db_type = '$db_type') ORDER BY 1;
list.label: DB Name
list.name: target
list.query: SELECT target_name AS __text, target_name AS __value FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_targets WHERE is_active = true AND ('$environment' = '.*' OR environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '.*' OR db_type = '$db_type') ORDER BY 1;

title: DB Port Blackbox SQL Ingest Verification
